message:
feat(sources): reserve "local" name for built-in source, auto-disambiguate SSH collisions

Prevent SSH remote sources from claiming the name "local" which is
reserved for the built-in local session source. When auto-generating
a source name from a host like user@local, the name is now
disambiguated to "local-ssh" via the new RESERVED_REMOTE_SOURCE_SUFFIX.

- Add BUILT_IN_LOCAL_SOURCE_NAME and RESERVED_REMOTE_SOURCE_SUFFIX constants
- Add validation in SourceDefinition::validate() rejecting reserved names
- Add normalize_generated_remote_source_name() for auto-disambiguation
- Add unit tests for validation and normalization edge cases
- Add E2E tests: --name local rejected; user@local auto-generates "local-ssh"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
